# Bug Report Template

Use this template when filing bug reports for any Project repository.

---

**Title format:** `[BUG] Short description of the issue`

---

## Severity

<!-- Select one -->
- [ ] **P0** — Production down, data corruption, security breach (1 hour response)
- [ ] **P1** — Critical functionality broken (4 hour response)
- [ ] **P2** — Important issue, workaround exists (24 hour response)
- [ ] **P3** — Minor issue, cosmetic (next sprint)

## Affected Service / Repository

<!-- Which Project component is affected? Select all that apply. -->
- [ ] myproject-core
- [ ] myproject-frontend
- [ ] myproject-crypto
- [ ] myproject-compliance
- [ ] myproject-ingestion
- [ ] myproject-ai
- [ ] myproject-infra
- [ ] myproject-docs

**Specific service/module (if known):**
<!-- e.g., event-chain-service, qr-verify-service, co-engine -->

## Steps to Reproduce

1. <!-- First step -->
2. <!-- Second step -->
3. <!-- Third step -->
4. <!-- Continue as needed -->

## Expected Behavior

<!-- What should happen when following the steps above? -->

## Actual Behavior

<!-- What actually happens? Include error messages verbatim. -->

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **OS** | <!-- e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11, macOS 14 --> |
| **Browser** | <!-- e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121 (if UI issue) --> |
| **Service version** | <!-- e.g., v1.2.0 or commit SHA --> |
| **Tenant ID** | <!-- if applicable --> |
| **Environment** | <!-- local / staging / production --> |
